name: David Adair
summary: Public speaker and rocketry personality who has long claimed that he viewed an unusual propulsion system at a classified Nevada facility.
profileStatus: Rocketry personality and Area 51 technology claimant
profileSummary: Public speaker and rocketry personality who has long claimed that he viewed an unusual propulsion system at a classified Nevada facility.
background: Self-described former child rocketry prodigy and aerospace consultant.
inclusionNote: Included because his Area 51 account has circulated for decades and influenced reverse-engineering and propulsion narratives. The extraordinary portions of the story are not independently established.
